title: PTC Inc. Stock Lost 4% In One Week, What's Next?
text: PTC Inc. stock (NASDAQ: PTC) has lost 4.1% in the last week, marginally lower than the S&P 500 (down 4%).

title: Got $3,000? These Stocks Could Double Your Money by 2030.
text: An industrial software company, a machine vision leader, and an aerospace giant make up this list of stocks that could generate excellent returns for investors.

title: The U.S. Senate Just Freed Energy Storage Stocks to Soar 75X
text: Source: petrmalinak / Shutterstock Just two days ago, the U.S. Senate passed a landmark piece of legislation. And it sets the stage for a particular group of stocks to soar 75X over the next several years.

title: 1 Growth Stock to Buy for the Next Decade
text: This industrial software company's core products are growing more than expected, and its growth products are primed to accelerate growth in the future.

title: PTC Named Overall Leader in Augmented Reality Connected Worker Assessment from PAC
text: PTC's Vuforia augmented reality solution suite described as "most comprehensive enterprise AR solution suite available in the market" PTC received highest scores in competence and market strength criteria categories BOSTON , Aug. 2, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- PTC (NASDAQ: PTC) today announced that, for the fourth consecutive year, it has been named the overall leader and a "Best in Class" vendor for its Vuforia® augmented reality (AR) solution suite in PAC's Innovation RADAR report. The full report, "Open Digital Platforms for the Industrial World 2022" is available here.
